description: Commercial invoice is issued in a different currency than the LC

expected_issues.description: Commercial invoice currency differs from the LC

false_positive_checks.description: Invoice umbrella article should stay suppressed when UCP600-18C is the actionable child rule.
Transport umbrella article should not leak into the invoice currency-only case.
Insurance umbrella article should not leak into the invoice currency-only case.
Insurance currency rule should not appear when only the invoice currency is wrong.
LC type uncertainty should not surface once a real documentary discrepancy is already present.
